title: Fix paste retrieval and remove draft editor origin errors

requirements.text: Remove or suppress the draft editor origin error (disallowed origin: https://molecular-lavender-hsv-draft.caffeine.xyz) that appears in the console during paste operations
acceptanceCriteria: Console no longer shows draft-editor origin errors
Paste creation and viewing functionality remains unaffected

requirements.text: Fix the backend paste retrieval logic so that newly created pastes with valid IDs (e.g., 1771800332721583303) return the correct paste data instead of null

quotes: Paste not found but remainingTime > 0 - possible password protection or access issue

acceptanceCriteria: Backend returns paste data for valid paste IDs that were just created
Paste view page displays the paste content correctly
No 'Paste Not Found' error when viewing immediately after creation

requirements.text: Verify that the paste ID format used during creation matches the format expected during retrieval, ensuring consistency between storage and lookup operations
acceptanceCriteria: Paste IDs stored during creation can be successfully retrieved
ID normalization works consistently across create and get operations

constraints: Paste data resetting between deployments is acceptable
Do not modify the Internet Identity integration or authentication flow
Preserve existing paste ID validation logic in frontend/src/utils/pasteIds.ts
nonGoals: Adding new paste features beyond fixing retrieval
